signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP Price Surge to $1
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs, Triggering XRP Price Surge to $1.42 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
